ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Dec-20-2016 Off Calendar

Plaintiffs Notice Of Motion And Motion For Default Prove-Up Hearing; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities; And Declaration Of Alexander Merino
Off Calendar Dec-08-2016 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: A. Mok. Proceedings reported by: Mitch Lyon, CSR#6840.

Matthew Scherling, Esq., specially appearing for Plaintiff, WINDSOR ROSEWOOD CARE CENTER, LLC, A DELAWARE LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY,
No appearance by defaulted defendant PAMELA YOUNG, AN INDIVIDUAL,
Default of Defendant has been duly entered.
Witness: Lourdes Devera, sworn and examined on behalf of Plaintiff.

Plaintiff's Exhibit:
1-Declaration of Lourdes Devera with A & B
Court returned all exhibits to Plaintiff.

After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant as follows:
Damages: $35,651.45
Pre-Judgment Interest: $0.00
Attorney's Fees: $0.00
Costs: $519.00
Total Judgment in the amount of $36,170.45

Judgment signed in open court.
